name: Blacktop Police Chase
author: Poki
description: Blacktop: Police Chase is a driving game where crime pays—if you can outrun the law! Pick up bank robbers, drop them off safely, and cash in big. But watch out—the cops are hot on your tail! Speed through the streets, dodge roadblocks, and upgrade to slick new rides. Can you escape the chase and rule the getaway game? How to play Blacktop: Police Chase? Drive: WASD or the arrow keys Brake: the space bar Look Back: B Reset: shift Who created Blacktop: Police Chase? Blacktop: Police Chase is created by Steelpan Interactive. Play their other games on Poki: Zeepkist: Crash 2D ! How can I play Blacktop: Police Chase for free? You can play Blacktop: Police Chase for free on Poki. Can I play Blacktop: Police Chase on mobile devices and desktop? Blacktop: Police Chase can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
